Only 1 method contributed to the median — the valuation should be treated as a rough anchor, not a precise fair value. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

coin_profile.name: Chainlink
coin_profile.description: Chainlink is the leading decentralised oracle network, providing real-world data to smart contracts across 1,000+ blockchain integrations. Node operators are paid in LINK for providing data feeds. Staking v0.2 is now live, allowing LINK holders to earn staking rewards while securing the network.

LINK.name: Chainlink

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (bear market) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.8/10 and survivability 80.0%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Fee-based methods (Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple) used DeFiLlama protocol fee data to anchor the valuation. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple produced a value below 10% of current price (fees are low relative to market cap) — shown in the breakdown chart but excluded from the median pool. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value is shown in the breakdown chart without contributing to the median: the implied IV is below 10% of current price, indicating the token is trading at a significant premium to its network activity level. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

LINK.iv_method: Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, Dilution Adjustment

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles
Strong quality score of 7.8/10 (Safe) across all key metrics
Chainlink maintains a top-17 market cap position with established liquidity
bear_points: DCF model suggests Chainlink is trading at a 4017.4% premium to fair value (est. $0.22)
High MC/Fees ratio of 238.39x means investors are paying a large premium relative to actual protocol fee generation
Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets

coin_profile.name: Litecoin
coin_profile.description: Litecoin is one of the oldest cryptocurrencies, created in 2011 as a 'lighter' version of Bitcoin. It offers faster block times (2.5 mins) and a larger supply (84M). Often used as a testnet for Bitcoin innovations, LTC is primarily a medium of exchange and store of value.

LTC.name: Litecoin

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.2/10 and survivability 66.7%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket B (Store of Value): Up to 6 methods are available — Monetary Premium, Production Cost Floor, Metcalfe Network Value, Supply Adjusted Value, Network Activity (NVT), and Rank Benchmark. Monetary Premium measures the token's current share of gold's market cap, projecting fair value if that share is maintained as gold appreciates. Production Cost Floor estimates the PoW mining cost (×2 fair-value premium) as a fundamental floor — it only fires for mineable assets. Supply Adjusted Value did not fire: FDV/MC is within acceptable range, so no supply dilution penalty was applied. Network Activity (NVT) treats volume as monetary circulation velocity — higher NVT targets apply to SoV assets held long-term rather than traded for fees. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.

LTC.iv_method: Monetary Premium, Production Cost Floor, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: At 0.02% of gold's market cap, substantial upside remains if monetary adoption continues to grow
Full gold parity would imply a price of $272,770 — 497927% above current price
Litecoin maintains a top-24 market cap position with established liquidity
bear_points: Trading below estimated production cost of $1,750.0 — miners may reduce security spend, weakening the network

coin_profile.name: Lido DAO
coin_profile.description: Lido is the largest liquid staking protocol, controlling ~32% of all staked ETH. It allows users to stake ETH and receive stETH, which can be used across DeFi. Lido earns 10% of all staking rewards as protocol revenue. LDO governs the protocol.

forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) did not contribute to the median: the implied fair value fell outside the 0.1x–10x price bounds (volume is very low or very high relative to circulating supply). Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Only 2 methods contributed to the median. More data sources (DeFiLlama fee history) would improve confidence in this estimate. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
